item.title: Citadel Securities invests $400M in Crypto.com, valuing the exchange at $20B in its first institutional funding round.
U.S. GENIUS Act stablecoin implementing rules miss July 18 deadline as core regulations remain in proposal form.
U.S. CLARITY Act market-structure bill misses July Senate vote; August 7 emerges as next critical deadline.
White House schedules Senate meeting to resolve CLARITY Act ethics dispute ahead of August recess deadline.
SEC plans Regulation Crypto proposal for July creating safe harbor exemptions for token fundraising and developers.
Visa launches stablecoin platform enabling banks and fintechs to issue, manage and settle digital dollars via its network.
T. Rowe Price launches the first actively managed multi-token spot crypto ETF offering diversified digital asset exposure.
Circle receives OCC national trust bank charter to provide digital asset custody services to institutional clients.
Ostium DeFi protocol loses $18M after attacker submits manipulated oracle timestamps to trigger false payouts.
EU MiCA grandfathering ends July 1 forcing unlicensed crypto service providers to halt EU operations; revisions underway.
Australia's Travel Rule takes effect July 1 with no minimum threshold, requiring identity data on all regulated exchange transfers.
AUSTRAC launches crypto supervision campaigns as Australia's AML/CTF licensing reforms enter full effect.
BIS warns stablecoin inflows have reached sovereign funding markets with a $3.5B impact on three-month T-bill yields.
Summer.fi halts vaults after $6M flash loan exploit manipulates USDC vault accounting in the Lazy Summer Protocol.
